name: Chicken with Arugula and Gorgonzola Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cheese in a bowl.
2. Marinate overnight.
3. Grill the chicken on one side for 4 minutes.
4. Turn over and add crumbled cheese.
5. Continue cooking until the cheese melts and the chicken is cooked through.
6. Serve over a bed of arugula.
